arts.sum: Deboys, 31, is currently the head of recruitment at Cardiff, where he was tasked with reducing the squad's age and identifying players the club would profit from in the future. Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone.

arts.ttl: Inside Frank Lampard's incredible revival as Coventry boss makes history with winning run
arts.sum: Frank Lampard is enjoying a new lease of life at Coventry City where he has managed to transform the Championship back into play-off contenders after a difficult start to the season

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney announcement made as former Derby County boss set for Man United return
arts.sum: Former Derby County head coach Wayne Rooney is set for a return to Manchester United to play in Soccer Aid for UNICEF 2025. Rooney spent almost two years in the dugout at Pride Park, winning 24 of his 85 matches before departing following the club's relegation to League One.

arts.sum: It's been suggested Rangers should go all out to secure the services of Frank Lampard, who has the backing of one of the best in the managerial game in Pep Guardiola

arts.ttl: Derby County could be missing 10 players for Frank Lampard's first return with Coventry City
arts.sum: The headline news is that £800,000 January signing Lars-Jorgen Salvesen is out for the season after undergoing knee surgery that has seen the Norwegian have some cartilage cleared out of his knee in what is an issue with his meniscus. The defender suffered a hamstring injury in training in midweek and will be out of the game tomorrow.

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard makes Derby County and Mel Morris admission ahead of Pride Park return
arts.sum: Lampard clearly gave Derby fans some good times in a short period, getting to the play-off final at Wembley and going so close to promotion. Coventry City boss Frank Lampard is unsure of the reception he will receive on his return to Derby County and says one of his "bigger regrets" was not taking them to the Premier League.
